title: Kastelan Robot
specialty: Heavy fire support · autonomous armoured assault
lore: Kastelan Robots are ancient war machines dating back to the Dark Age of Technology — enormous humanoid automata standing nearly four metres tall, armoured in thick ceramite and armed with phosphor serpentas or heavy carapace-mounted weaponry.

They are not Servitors and not true artificial intelligences — their machine spirits are complex but bound by strict behavioural protocols installed by the Cybernetica Datasmith who accompanies each maniple. The Datasmith reprograms them between engagements using sacred Cybernetica Cortex protocols.

Three battle protocols govern Kastelan behaviour: Aegis (defensive, reactive), Protector (stationary fire suppression), and Conqueror (aggressive advance). Switching protocols mid-battle requires the Datasmith to physically interact with each robot — making tactical flexibility slow but devastating when achieved.
